name: 12pk Mixed Bower Tumbler Set Gray - Threshold™
description:
Refresh your drinkware collection with this 12-Pack Mixed Bower Tumbler Set from Threshold™. This kitchen glass set includes twelve mixed glasses — six with a 12.5-ounce capacity and six that hold 18.6 ounces — giving you options to serve drinks of all kinds. Designed in solid gray, these glasses are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
